v1_paper.description: Prompt original du papier BTGenBot (Izzo 2024). Instruction Alpaca du dataset.
v1_paper.system: You will be provided a summary of a task performed by a behavior tree, and your objective is to express this behavior tree in XML format.

v2_btcpp_enriched.description: Variante enrichie : rappel BehaviorTree.CPP v4 (structure root/BehaviorTree, nœuds standards, blackboard).
v2_btcpp_enriched.system: You will be provided a summary of a task performed by a behavior tree, and your objective is to express this behavior tree in XML format. Generate a valid BehaviorTree.CPP v4 XML tree wrapped in <root> with a single <BehaviorTree> named MainTree. Use Sequence/Fallback/Action/Condition nodes. Blackboard variables use {var} syntax.
